name: Pregabalin And Nortriptyline Tablets
about: Pregabalin And Nortriptyline Tablets are a combination of two medicines used to treat nerve pain. Pregabalin works by reducing the pain signals that are sent by damaged nerves in the body while nortriptyline is a tricyclic antidepressant that works by increasing the levels of certain chemicals in the brain to reduce pain. These tablets are available in the physical form of tablets and are categorized under the drug type of General Medicines. The dosage guidelines of these tablets are to be taken as per the doctors suggestion and the tablets must be stored in a cool place. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a packaging of 1x10 tablets per box.
